Baron Capital rolls out five active ETFs, SpaceX becomes the firm's biggest investment
Baron Capital Launches Active ETFs, Building Upon Investment Legacy in Active Management

holdings.infoBox: BCTK is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Space Exploration Technologies stock at 10.75%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 7.92%, Lam Research at 7.48%, Broadcom at 6.38%, and NVIDIA at 5.78%.

overview.description: The Baron Technology ETF (BCTK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks capital growth through an actively managed global portfolio of technology and technology-related companies. Non-US securities are limited to 35% of the funds assets. BCTK was launched on Dec 15, 2025 and is issued by Baron.

data.text: Though new to the ETF market, Baron Capital is not new to investment management. The firm entered the ETF space last year, bringing its “old school active” philosophy to investors.
